violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food/vegetable dicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2023
